{{Quote|From here it looks as though the whole galaxy is waiting, holding its breath for just the right moment.|Saduu Nagag|<ref name="RotM" />}}
The '''Aplocaph''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] preoccupied with finding love. Members of the species treated exotic locations and leisure time as an opportunity to find someone special. For this reason, during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the young Aplocaph [[Saduu Nagag]] took a cruise aboard the giant [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']] up the [[Relgim Run/Legends|Relgim Run]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]]. Almost [[Standard hour/Legends|hourly]],<ref name="RotM" /> Nagag cleaned his skin until it gleamed to ensure he was well groomed should he meet his "one, crucial" being<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|356|Nagag, Saduu}}</ref> with whom to fall in love.<ref name="RotM" /> Nagag was present on the ''Princess'' when it was boarded by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] within [[Maelstrom Nebula/Legends|the Maelstrom]] [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]].<ref name="CSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Aplocaph first appeared in [[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']], a [[1989]] [[roleplaying game]] adventure written by [[Ray Winninger]] and released by [[West End Games]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="RotM" />
